text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I'm done... with the paced running... exercise...
choice_data_list: Great work! Go ahead and take a breather.
Great work! Go ahead and take a breather.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the halfway point of summer camp.
I've noticed that Satono Diamond's movements
have become markedly sluggish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Training under the scorching sun is really
stamina-draining. All these consecutive days of
hard work must be catching up to her.
Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whew, that's ten laps done! They're starting to
get a lot easier!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to double the load and go for
another set!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I'd like to begin our next exercise, please!
choice_data_list: You should rest a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: No need! Let's start!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...
choice_data_list:
This seems like a good place to end our
morning session.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
B-but we haven't completed everything on our
schedule yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To counteract her plea to continue, I explain how
she won't see any big improvements if she runs
while fatigued. In fact, her lap times have been
getting worse.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If I stop every time I reach my limit, I'll never
reach the top! I must push myself harder to gain
the strength I need to break the jinx!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Besides, Kita is working hard too! I can't let her
beat me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her pleading gaze falls on Kitasan Black, who is
drenched in sweat as she begins her next training
set a little distance away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black trains by breaking her limits though
pure spirit and guts, a method I'm sure wouldn't
suit Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I think you might find this useful.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's a compilation of my training data and race
recordings that my previous instructors put
together.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The Satono family has always made use of
cutting-edge technology in training, so the data
should be reliable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I realize she must have trained in controlled
environments her whole life. She must be tiring so
quickly because she's not used to exercising in
the heat.
choice_data_list: Thank you. But for now, let's stop for lunch.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: All right...
Hey, hey, hey! Satono and Satono's trainer!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'm training with you guys!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh? Turbo?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: We're training as a group! And you're invited!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Slow down, Turbo. You're confusing her.
Allow me to explain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing my confusion, Satono Diamond explains
that this group had organized a welcome party
for new students.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo, Matikanetannhauser, and Daitaku
Helios are among the faces that join Ikuno Dictus
and crowd around us.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Would you like to join us for group training?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
One benefit of summer camp is that it allows us to
train in large groups. Why not take advantage of
such an opportunity?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, no need to hurt yourself overthinking this.
Last year, Teio and her friends helped Kitasan
with her training, and—

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
It's no fair that Teio's the only one who gets to be
all cool! I wanna be a cool older student too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, it'd be pretty great if you trained with
us.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
You'll do it, right? C'mon, you gotta! Please,
please, pleeeaaase?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: We'd love to have you if you aren't opposed to it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um... What do you think, Trainer?
choice_data_list: What kind of training are you going to do?
What kind of training are you going to do?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
We're deciding between two different exercises
at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus goes over their plans, both of which
contain reasonable exercises for strength building
that won't cause overexertion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, they also seem fun and should help
improve Satono Diamond's mood.
choice_data_list: We'd love to join you all.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! You can leave everything to me, Satono!
Consider me your trusty-dusty mentor!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! I'm counting on you then, Turbo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Now that that's all settled, let's have lunch! ♪
What should I have? Curry? Yakisoba? Or maybe
both!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ☆ Why not make it a feast? Everyone orders at least three things!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Isn't it a bit early for lunch?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Let's meet back here after we're done eating.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Now then, which training exercise do you think is
better, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think about the kind of training that would best
suit Satono Diamond right now and decide they
should...
choice_data_list: Play suspended volleyball using paper balloons.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Then, we shall build a sand tunnel. We've
received permission to use the area near the
beach huts, so let's head over.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Um... I have a question. Does building a sand
tunnel really count as training?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It certainly does! We're going to be making a
tunnel wide enough for us to walk through, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
We'll have to dig and dig and dig a ton to get
enough sand for a tunnel like that.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I see... That does sound like quite the workout!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Whew... Do you think this is enough?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Looks good to me! Careful not to fall in!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: The same goes for you, Tannhauser. Be careful.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You're not kidding! I really do have to
watch myself...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Next, we've gotta build up the
foundation. We'll have to add a bunch of water to
the sand and then stamp it down to compact it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Then we've gotta pile up sand to the height of the
tunnel, stamp it down, pile more up, and rinse
and repeat! ♪

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Yay! We did it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow! You can really walk through it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Not bad for a bunch of amateurs, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wheeew... The exhaustion's catching up to me
now...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That was a lot of manual labor we did. All that
digging, running back and forth to fetch
seawater, and stomping to compress the sand...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Even so, I had a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Building a sand tunnel proves effective in
improving both Satono Diamond's strength and
mood.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Okay, now there's only one last thing to
do! LET'S DESTROY IIIT!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I understand how you feel, but it wouldn't be safe
to just leave a hole in the ground like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sand tunnel's existence is fleeting and
disappears like a mirage, leaving us all with a
bittersweet memory of group training.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Suspended volleyball? Paper balloons?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes. We'll be using a paper balloon instead of a
ball. You'll understand once we start playing.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Let's start our first game! It's Palmer and Helios
versus Satono and Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Palmer & Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey-heeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Follow my lead, Satono!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okaaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Here comes the serve! Taaake THIS!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The paper balloon flies high, remains floating
weightlessly in the air, and... shows little sign of
coming down.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
All riiight! Come to Turbo! I'm ready! I'm so, so, so
ready! ...Uuugh, come down already!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It should fall around here—oh no! The wind
changed direction! I won't make it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ah... I couldn't reach it...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Gimme a break! This balloon is waaay too slow!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Suspended volleyball... So that's where the name
comes from. A paper balloon is much lighter than
a beach ball, so it stays in the air longer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And if you don't hit the balloon hard enough, it
won't reach the other side, so you constantly
have to be primed and ready to go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. You have to wait patiently until the time
is right and carefully judge how much strength
you need to strike the balloon.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
The wind makes it fly all over the place too! It's
literally giving us a run for our money. Lol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Having to wait for the right timing... It's just like
how we have to watch for the right time to start
all-out sprinting during a race.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You need restraint to resist being influenced by those around you and hold off until the right time for you. This is really good training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Learning to calmly read the wind and the speed
of the falling balloon helps Satono Diamond lead
her team to victory.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That was very well done. Especially you, Satono. I
was really impressed by your ability to remain
calm no matter the situation.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I was just caught up in the game because it
was so fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the group training has helped Satono
Diamond improve her patience and her mood.
